name: Indy 500
description: Indy 500 is a single-player and multiplayer racing game simulating the Indianapolis 500 race. The core gameplay revolves around the player controlling an open-wheel race car and competing against other AI-controlled or human-controlled opponents on a replica of the Indianapolis Motor Speedway. The objective is to be the first to complete 200 laps. The game features multiple difficulty levels, which adjust the AI aggressiveness and car handling. Players can qualify for a starting position via a timed qualifying session. The race features realistic physics, including tire wear, fuel consumption, and damage. Players must manage their car's condition and make strategic pit stops for fuel, tire changes, and repairs. There is a basic heads-up display providing critical information like speed, lap number, fuel level, tire wear, and damage status. The game features customizable car setups, allowing players to adjust parameters like tire pressure and wing angle to optimize performance. Different car models with varying performance characteristics are available. Penalties are assessed for cutting corners or causing collisions. The game includes basic replay functionality to review races and qualifying runs. Weather conditions are static for each race, but several different conditions can occur. There is a championship mode where players race several races with championship points at stake.
